introSection:
Python is an E&F Miler Industries family roller coaster located at Spring Park in Tuscumbia, Alabama, USA.

The ride originally opened as Python Pit at Jeepers! in Livonia, Michigan in 1998.

On March 1, 2003 a 43-year old Jeepers employee was killed when the train hit him from behind while he was examining the track.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders. Python Pit has a snake-shaped train.

fullText:
Python is an E&F Miler Industries family roller coaster located at Spring Park in Tuscumbia, Alabama, USA.

The ride originally opened as Python Pit at Jeepers! in Livonia, Michigan in 1998.

On March 1, 2003 a 43-year old Jeepers employee was killed when the train hit him from behind while he was examining the track.



Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders. Python Pit has a snake-shaped train.
